creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
Phil, James,

please check the information on the following pages as I think it may
provide you some technical details on your problem:

http://wiki.freebsd.org/powerpc
http://www.freebsd.org/platforms/ppc
http://people.freebsd.org/~grehan/iso_install.txt

Depending on your hardware, there might be an ATA issue which needs
loader tweaking. But first please check, if your hardware is supported
at all and be sure to check with the nice folks at ppc@

HTH

Volker
